channel.title: Sports
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Sports, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: USA's Malik Tillman Says He’d 'Love to Player For' Arsenal One Day
item.description: Malik Tillman highlighted Arsenal as a Premier League club he would "love to play for."

item.title: No. 17 St. John's Smacks Creighton, Marking Longest Winning Streak in 4 Decades
item.description: No. 17 St. John’s blew out Creighton on Saturday for its 13th straight win, marking the school’s longest winning streak in 41 years.

item.title: Canada Captain Alphonso Davies Limps Off With Injured Hamstring In Bayern Win
item.description: Canada captain Alphonso Davies has gone off injured during Bayern Munich’s Bundesliga win over Eintracht Frankfurt.

item.title: MLB Spring Training Buzz: Dodgers Claim Jack Suwinski Off Waivers From Pirates
item.description: Notable news, notes and buzz with MLB spring training ramping up ahead of the World Baseball Classic and Opening Day.

item.title: All Rise! Yankees Star Aaron Judge Hits 2 Home Runs in Spring Training Debut
item.description: Reigning American League MVP Aaron Judge hit two home runs in his 2026 spring training debut for the Yankees.

item.title: Yankees' Judge slugs 2 HRs, 'excited' about WBC
item.description: Yankees slugger Aaron Judge hit two homers in his spring debut Saturday as he gears up for next month's World Baseball Classic with Team USA.

item.title: Cactus cameo: Dodgers play Ohtani before WBC
item.description: Shohei Ohtani is scheduled to play a couple of Cactus League games for the Dodgers before he joins Team Japan for the World Baseball Classic.

item.title: Tkachuk on Canada rivalry: 'There's hatred there'
item.description: On the eve of the Olympic gold medal game, Brady Tkachuk said for the U.S. to win its ultimate goal, his teammates will have to take down Canada, the ...

item.title: Mayweather set to unretire after Tyson exhibition
item.description: Former boxing superstar Floyd Mayweather Jr. says he is unretiring and will resume his undefeated career after his planned exhibition bout against Mik...

item.title: Michigan, Duke top NCAA's early bracket preview
item.description: Michigan was the overall No. 1 seed in the NCAA tournament men's basketball selection committee's bracket preview, revealed on Saturday, followed by D...
